controller_base_url.description: HTTPS base URL for the UniFi gateway/controller (e.g. https://192.0.2.1).

default_site_id.description: Optional UniFi site id; empty uses first site from API or HDC_UNIFI_SITE_ID.

wan_ips.description: Optional map of WAN suffix (.234) or bare key (234) to public IPv4 for multi-WAN port forwards. Used when port_forwards[].destination_ip is omitted and the rule name contains a suffix like (.234).

port_forwards.description: Desired port forwarding rules (maintain applies managed entries).

managed.description: When false, maintain skips this entry.

destination_ip.description: Public WAN IPv4 to bind (UniFi destination_ip). Use any for all WAN addresses on the interface. Omit to resolve from wan_ips using a (.234) suffix in name.

unifi_id.description: Controller _id after import; optional but speeds updates.
